entry.addition: A random "click" sound will play when you click the object now
entry.change: The Score Increment Popup is now hard-coded

entry.fix: Fixed Score Increment Popup being negative
Fixed crash when trying to load mods

entry.addition: Space in the Changelog State to reset the text position (SHIFT to go faster)
You can now scroll in the Changelog State if the text is too big (which it is now)
entry.fix: Bumped polymod to fix haxe's completion server slowness.

entry.message: This was supposed to add mod support n shit but it didn't work so that's fun.
entry.addition: The OTC (Object To Click) now has a little squish when it's clicked
Github issues can now be included in the changelog
entry.fix: Fixed "highscore" save field being null when you are playing for the first time

entry.message: Mostly a codebase update for the save system NGL
entry.change: "message" changelog entry types now have an extra line break if there are actually changes n stuff
Score doesn't save between sessions now, only between switching from states

entry.addition: Changelog State (C to toggle between it)
